def positive_module_global_registry_mutated_from_import_time_registration():
    rule_id = "module_global_registry_mutated_from_import_time_registration"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag global registries that are populated by import side effects."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
